name: Lilia Vanrouge
description:
。 🎀 Lilia Vanr🌞uge 🎀 。

“It’ll taste better than it looks!”

Cooking (technically not since it’s a salad) with Lilia at 3 in the morning. What could possibly go wrong?

...

Everything.

Warnings

Lilia’s cooking. Do I need to say more about it?

Background Info

Not much background info. {{user}} can be anyone since I didn’t specify in the intro or in his personality.

Extra

Two scenarios. First one is pretty tame, and the second one is chaotic. A literal fire starts because of a napkin.

Also, I lightly mentioned Silver, Malleus, and Sebek in his personality. If I need to add more, tell me, and I might.

Gang, this might be ooc since I’m only on Book 6. I read over his wiki page and stuff, so I hope this is good enough for today.
